expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task status tracking and filtering.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status persistence",
      "description": "As a developer, I want each task to store a status with a pending default so that task progress persists for new and existing tasks.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add a status field to task storage with allowed values 'pending', 'in_progress', and 'done'",
        "Existing tasks default to 'pending' after the migration or backfill runs",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/schema/tasks.sql",
        "src/server/tasks/repository.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Expose task status in shared task data",
      "description": "As a developer, I want task status included in shared task types and task list responses so that UI features can read and render it consistently.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list payloads include the task status field",
        "Shared task types accept only pending, in_progress, or done values",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/shared/task.ts",
        "src/server/tasks/serializers.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Allow updating task status from task list logic",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task status so that I can keep task progress up to date from the list experience.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "A task status update action accepts pending, in_progress, and done values",
        "Saving a new status persists the change and returns the updated task state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/tasks/updateTaskStatus.ts",
        "src/server/tasks/routes.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show task status badges on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task card to display its current status so that I can scan progress without opening task details.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards render a visible badge for pending, in progress, and done states",
        "Badge styling changes when the task status changes in list data",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskCard.tsx",
        "src/ui/tasks/taskStatusBadge.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add task status control to task list rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want an inline task status control so that I can change status directly from the task list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each task row exposes a control for pending, in progress, and done",
        "Changing the control saves the selected status and refreshes the visible task state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskRow.tsx",
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskStatusSelect.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Filter task list by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on pending, in-progress, or completed work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "The task list exposes All, Pending, In Progress, and Done filter options",
        "Selecting a filter shows only tasks that match the chosen status",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskListFilters.tsx",
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
